5 Tips For Staying Productive While Working From Home

Working from home has become the norm for a lot of teams, including some of ours who work remote a few days a week. Here are five tips that have helped us stay focused.

1. Set a real start and end time

Treat your workday like you would in an office — start and stop at consistent times.

2. Take proper breaks

Step away from your desk for lunch instead of eating at your keyboard.

3. Over-communicate with your team

Async updates go a long way toward keeping everyone aligned.

4. Invest in your setup

A second monitor and a decent chair make a bigger difference than people expect.

5. Protect your evenings

Close the laptop at a consistent time so work doesn't creep into the rest of your day.
